Class BlockVector3Imp

java.lang.Object
com.sk89q.worldedit.math.BlockVector3
com.sk89q.worldedit.math.BlockVector3Imp
public final class BlockVector3Imp extends BlockVector3
An immutable 3-dimensional vector.
